01 · Traceability

360° Farm-to-Buyer
Traceability.

Offline-first, blockchain-backed, and built for the realities of Nigerian agriculture. Every farm, batch, and journey — recorded immutably and accessible to every authorised stakeholder.

  • Offline GPS polygon farm mapping (no signal required)
  • Real-time batch tracking: farmer → cooperative → port
  • Dynamic QR codes with full blockchain audit trail

02 · Field Agent App

Offline-first.
No signal? No problem.

Field agents register farmers, map GPS farm boundaries, and conduct CLMRS household surveys entirely offline. All data syncs automatically when connectivity is restored.

  • GPS polygon mapping with satellite-snap accuracy
  • Offline farmer registration (camera & signature)
  • Child Labour Monitoring System (CLMRS) surveys
  • Sync queue with automatic retry logic on reconnect

04 · Sustainability

Doing good,
verifiably.

Sustainability isn't just a buzzword — it's hardcoded into our platform. Environmental protection, social equity, and economic empowerment, all verifiable.

01

Social Equity — CLMRS

Identifies at-risk children, monitors farming household conditions, and drives targeted interventions including school support and income diversification.

02

Environmental Protection

Farm polygons auto-checked against WDPA and NCF databases. Failed checks trigger instant export block and prevent sourcing from protected areas.

03

Economic Empowerment

Transparent market access guarantees fair trading for farmers, LBAs, brokers, and exporters. Automated digital payments drive financial inclusion.

FAQ
Common
questions,
answered.

Everything you need to know about getting started with Ceelah, EUDR compliance, and the platform.

What is EUDR and does it affect Nigerian exporters?
+
The EU Deforestation Regulation requires proof that cocoa, coffee, and palm oil aren't sourced from deforested land post-2020. Nigerian exporters selling to EU buyers must provide geolocated due diligence statements — Ceelah automates this entirely.
Does the app work offline in remote areas?
+
Absolutely. Our mobile app registers farmers, maps GPS polygons, and conducts CLMRS surveys with zero connectivity. All data syncs automatically when internet is restored — designed for rural Nigerian cocoa-growing communities.
How does blockchain improve traceability?
+
Blockchain creates an immutable, tamper-proof audit trail. Once a batch transaction is recorded — farm location, harvest date, weight — it cannot be altered. This is the gold standard EU regulators accept for proving no deforestation occurred.
Is Ceelah Xpress free to use?
+
Yes — the free tier provides 3 searches/month. Paid plans offer 20–100+ searches, QR generation, API access, and EUDR PDF export. All tiers are currently in a free pilot phase for EU importers.
What commodities does Ceelah support?
+
Ceelah supports all EUDR-regulated commodities: cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soya, and cattle products — plus other agro-commodities traded in the Nigerian market.

360°
Traceability:
Farm to Ship.

Offline-first, blockchain-backed, and built for Nigerian agriculture. Every farm, batch, and journey — recorded immutably.

Farm-to-Fork Visibility
and Traceability on every Seed.
Why It Matters

100% offline-first capability means no farmer is left behind due to poor connectivity. Real-time farm-to-fork visibility ensures transparency and compliance monitoring across the entire supply chain.

01
Farmer Identification and Farm Mapping
—Onboard farmers and map farms, available in remote areas without internet connectivity.
—Draw GPS boundaries, mark soil zones, and identify irrigation points.
—Sync data automatically when connectivity resumes.
02
Commodity Tracking
—One platform for farmers, field agents, traders, and buyers.
—Real-time visibility of origin and supply chain stakeholders.
—Immutable transaction records.
03
Protected Areas Identification
—Pre-loaded national protected area databases (WDPA, NCF).
—Automatic deforestation risk detection.
—Prevents costly export rejections due to environmental violations.

Identify

Monitor

03
Remediate
Targeted interventions for identified cases of child labour.

Ensuring ethical sourcing isn't just about the environment — it's about the people who grow our food.

How It Works
Farm to export
in three steps.

Field agents use the offline app to map farms and register farmers. Commodities are aggregated and tracked. Exporters generate instant EUDR compliance reports via Ceelah Xpress.

Map the Farm
GPS boundaries drawn offline. Farmer details, soil zones, and deforestation status auto-checked against WDPA.
✓ Offline GPS
Track the Batch
Commodities assigned unique digital IDs. Quality metrics recorded at each transfer point. Logistics tracked in real time.
✓ Digital ID
Verify & Export
Generate instant EUDR compliance reports via Ceelah Xpress. QR codes attached to shipments for buyer verification.
✓ Ceelah Xpress
Built for Africa's Reality
Trusted by
global markets.

Offline-First Architecture

Designed for rural areas with poor connectivity. Map farms and record transactions offline — syncs automatically when back online.

Tamper-Proof Records

Immutable records ensure data integrity from farm to export, eliminating fraud and building trust with international buyers.

Multi-Stakeholder Platform

A unified ecosystem connecting farmers, aggregators, transporters, and exporters on a single source of truth.

Compliance-Ready

Pre-configured for EUDR and other global regulatory standards, turning complex compliance into a simple, automated process.

Every batch, every farm,
fully traceable.

Buyer Experience
See what buyers see.

Every EU importer scanning your batch QR gets this complete compliance picture — no calls, no paperwork.

GPS Farm Polygon

Exact farm boundary coordinates mapped offline by field agents. Verified against WDPA and NCF protected area databases.

Deforestation-Free Certificate

Automatic clearance from pre-loaded WDPA and Nigeria NCF databases. Issued per batch — not per farm.

Farmer Profile & CLMRS Status

Farmer name, harvest date, CLMRS screening result, and demographic data — all linked to the specific batch.

EUDR Due Diligence PDF

Article 9 compliant due diligence statement — downloadable in one click. Accepted by EU customs and port authorities.

Process
How it works.
Enter Batch ID or Scan QR

Found on jute bag or shipping container label. No account needed for the free tier.

See the Full Journey

Interactive map: GPS polygon, deforestation status, CLMRS data, and logistics route to port.

Download EUDR Report

One-click Article 9 compliant PDF — ready for EU customs, port authorities, and audit trails.

What You Get
Full lifecycle,
complete picture.
Farm Location (GPS Polygon)
Exact farm boundary, soil zones, and coordinates — mapped offline, synced on reconnect.
Farmer Name & Harvest Date
Digitally signed farmer profile linked to the batch — CLMRS screened and verified.
Deforestation-Free Certificate
Auto-generated clearance from WDPA and NCF databases. Accepted by EU regulators.
Logistics Journey to Port
Full chain of custody — every handoff from farm gate to Hamburg, Rotterdam, or any EU entry point.

Connect Every Link in the Chain.

Warehousing, Operations, Logistics, Finance — unified in one platform for agro-commodity workflows.

Value Proposition
A single operating system for your agro-commodity value chain.

Manage inventory, field operations, transport, and financial workflows from one connected system built for exporters, operations managers, and logistics teams.

CeelahSCM brings warehousing, operations, logistics, and finance together so every handoff is documented, every stock movement is visible, and every payout is easier to reconcile.
